args:
set -eu
measure_dir=$(mktemp -d)
measure_out=$(cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- measure replay-safe-closure --out "$measure_dir")
printf '%s' "$measure_out" | grep -q 'measurement intent=replay_safe_closure'
grep -q '"intent":"replay_safe_closure"' "$measure_dir/measurement_report.json"
grep -q '"closure_outcome":"full_compile_closure"' "$measure_dir/measurement_report.json"
grep -q '"reused_artifact_count":11' "$measure_dir/measurement_report.json"
grep -q '"phase_timings":' "$measure_dir/measurement_report.json"
printf 'measured-replay-safe\n'
